---
title: "kalshi_perform"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `kalshi_perform()`

Perform a Kalshi API Request

## Usage

```r
kalshi_perform(req)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `req` | An httr2 request object. |

## Value

Parsed JSON response as a list.

## Description

Internal helper to execute a request and parse the JSON response.
